problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Thermoelectric. Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
